name: Government Permit Application
description: Standard set for online government permit applications: real-name verification + ID + permanent address. Optimised for Chinese 政务服务 portals; the same fields work for most countries' citizen services.
description_zh: 标准的政务事项在线申请配方:实名验证 + 身份证 + 户籍地址。针对中国政务服务门户优化;同样字段适用于大多数国家的公民服务。

fields.justification: Legal name on file with government records.
fields.justification_zh: 政府档案中的法定姓名。

fields.justification: National ID number for record matching.
fields.justification_zh: 国民身份证号,用于档案匹配。

fields.justification: Confirms CTID / equivalent real-name verification has been completed on TDEN.
fields.justification_zh: 确认在 TDEN 上已完成 CTID 或等同实名验证。

fields.justification: Optional: SMS notification for permit status updates.
fields.justification_zh: 可选:许可状态变更短信通知。

purpose: Government permit / license / certificate applications. Replaces paper-form submission with TDEN-verified attribute disclosure. Government agency receives signed VCs they can verify against TDEN's chain — no need to re-verify the same documents at every agency.
purpose_zh: 政府许可 / 执照 / 证书申请。用 TDEN 验证的属性披露替代纸质表单。政府机构收到可在 TDEN 链上验证的签名 VC — 不需要在每个机构重新验证同样的证件。
author: TDEN team
